---
name: 📚 Documentation Improvement
about: Suggest improvements or report problems with the documentation
title: "[DOC] <Short description of the issue>"
labels: documentation
assignees: ''

---

## 📄 Description

Clearly describe the issue or improvement you'd like to suggest for the documentation.  
What part of the documentation is unclear, incorrect, or missing?

## 📍 Location

Please provide the URL or file path of the documentation page that needs updating, if known.

- URL or file path: 

## ✍️ Suggested Fix or Improvement (Optional)

If you have an idea for how to fix the issue or want to provide an example of clearer wording, include it here.

## 💻 Environment (if applicable)

If this issue is about generated or built documentation (e.g., Sphinx docs), please include:

- Operating System:
- Python version:
- Documentation build method (e.g., `make html`):

## 📷 Screenshots (Optional)

If helpful, add a screenshot of the documentation section.

---

👋 Thanks for helping us improve the documentation!
